Package index

All functions

build_expr_long()
Building long-format expression data
compute_expr_stats()
Computing per-group expression statistics
compute_gene_specificity()
Computing gene specificity (Gini score)
example_se
Example SingleCellExperiment dataset from Muraro Subset
plot_scatter()
Scatter plot between genes
plot_violin()
Violin plot of gene expression
